body.title: CCWorkerShim: listener as background thread, not subprocess
body.description:
CCWorkerShim.start() currently spawns cc_worker_listener as a subprocess (subprocess.Popen). Move the listener loop into a background thread owned by the shim. This eliminates per-slot pid files and subprocess lifecycle gaps, and makes ensure_daemon_running() bidirectional (OPEN+alive → stop; CLOSED+dead → start).

Changes to devices/claude/worker_shim.py:
1. Add threading.Event self._stop_event and Thread self._thread
2. start(): instead of Popen, instantiate CCWorkerListener(imap=make_bus_connection(), ...) and call listener.start() — which already runs its poll as a thread (see cc_worker_listener.py line 81)
3. stop(): call listener.stop() + self._stop_event.set() + thread.join(timeout=5)
4. ensure_daemon_running(): make bidirectional — if circuit OPEN and thread alive → call self.stop(); if circuit CLOSED and thread dead → call self.start()
5. self_test(): check self._thread.is_alive() instead of reading a pid file
6. Remove _read_pid_file(), _listener_pid_file() pid-file machinery (no longer needed once thread-hosted)

Changes to devices/granny/cc_worker_listener.py:
- run_forever() docstring update: this is the standalone entry point for direct invocation or testing; not called by the shim any more.
- No logic changes — the CCWorkerListener class is already thread-safe and correct.

**Affected files:**
devices/claude/worker_shim.py (primary — thread replace Popen, bidirectional ensure_daemon_running),
devices/granny/cc_worker_listener.py (docstring only),
tests/claude/test_cc_worker_shim.py (replace subprocess mocks with thread/CCWorkerListener mocks)

**Design rules:** log-every-state-change; bus/ owns IMAP (thread calls bus connection, doesn't own the transport layer); no-sqlite

**Scope boundary:** CCWorkerShim only. DickSimnel shim is a separate ticket. Does not touch Granny routing, web UI, or the announce protocol. Out of scope: moving announce/withdraw into shim constructor (separate refactor).

**Test plan:** Replace all `patch('subprocess.Popen')` in test_cc_worker_shim.py with thread mocks; test start() creates a live thread; test stop() joins the thread; test ensure_daemon_running() calls stop() when circuit OPEN + thread alive; test self_test() reads thread.is_alive(); 15 existing tests must all pass with new behavior.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/ is the log hierarchy. Never write to a flat — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle: `rollback()` must be idempotent — safe to call even if — applies: tags: pattern, pattern-001 (source: docs/design_patterns_inventory.md#PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle)
[error] PATTERN-004: Flat-File Registry (Atomic Write): The skeleton must never depend on Postgres — skeleto — applies: tags: pattern, pattern-004 (source: docs/design_patterns_inventory.md#PATTERN-004: Flat-File Registry (Atomic Write))
…and 37 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: worker_shim.py: CCWorkerListener thread replaces Popen; ensure_daemon_running() bidirectional; CCWorkerListener.is_alive() added; 16 tests
